title: Delta-Lens PR context compiler
goal: Turn PR/revision deltas into compact RepoBrief review context: changed ranges, adjacent graph blast radius, likely tests/contracts/docs, citations and freshness gaps without producing review verdicts.

acceptance.assertion: The compiler can represent changed ranges and their surrounding evidence without requiring a full repo dump in every review.
Graph/symbol/relation signals are reported as bounded hints with stale/missing/degraded status.
The output is review context only and does not approve, reject or score the PR as safe.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #919: RepoBrief now has a deterministic read-only delta context compiler that turns unified git diffs into changed-file/hunk context and optionally enriches it from existing bundle signals without issuing review verdicts.
validation: External review material was evaluated and resulted in parser, status, performance and signal-gap fixes before merge.

Lenskit PR #919 GitHub CI passed after final head: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, validate-merge-meta, contract checks, reusable fixture validation and webui-js-tests.
Local before merge: 298 focused RepoBrief/delta/symbol/relation/source-citation/access/preflight tests passed.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check origin/main...HEAD passed.
Post-merge on origin/main e90cfa9beb7bada0d04b7ed720c0a4d512fd3500: same 298 tests passed, targeted ruff passed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS and diff-check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t005-delta-context: repobrief.delta_context_compiler accepts unified git diff input and emits changed_files, hunk ranges, surrounding ranges and review_context.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t005-no-full-dump-required: The compiler works without a bundle and reports bundle absence as informational gap, so diff representation does not require a full RepoBrief dump.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t005-optional-signals: With an existing bundle it adds bounded optional hints from python_symbol_index_json, relation_cards_jsonl and resolved evidence/source citation projection.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t005-boundary: Output includes explicit review_boundary non-verdict and does not authorize merge, approval, rejection or correctness claims.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t005-gap-semantics: Output separates input_validity, signal_quality and context_completeness; optional empty signals are info, degraded/invalid signals are warn/error.
